name: Brown Dog Security Blanket - S - Cloud Island™
description:
Comfort your little one in pup-tacular style with this Dog Small Security Blanket from cloud Island™. This adorable baby accessory is a handkerchief-shaped brown blanket made of soft faux fur with coordinating satin trim for a touch of shine. It's topped with a plush dog head featuring 3D floppy ears, a globular nose and little arms that will instantly catch their attention. The perfect size for stroller rides and car trips, it's a warm and cuddly companion to keep your kid company at home or on the go.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
